reviews.review_title: The game has very good potential
reviews.review_description:
I can only select to fly 2 types of jets..How do I download or get more jets 
Or airplanes

developer_response.body:
thank you , you can copy 3d model *.glb  to app by usb link
https://flyme4meta.blogspot.com/2024/06/instructions-for-adding-more-aircraft.html

reviews.review_description: Neat concept.  Changing the size of the aircraft crashed my Oculus.  Like hard.  It won't let me open any other app.  I've closed and restarted the oculus several times.

developer_response.body:
thanks for your feedback
do you download any 3d models from sketchfab?
and how many space left  in your quest2 ?
I upload a new version v1.2, you can try this
